problem_id: Two-Way Interoperability between the Single Window System and Department Systems
summary: Design a layer that facilitates two-way propagation of service requests using UBID as the common join key between Karnataka's Single Window System and legacy department systems.
key_steps: Implement Android layer for two-way interoperability
Use UBID as common join key
constraints_addressed: Data inconsistency due to manual data entry
Lack of real-time updates between systems
